description: 7-agent formation for generating IP-safe architecture diagrams and process flow visualizations for investor presentations, product showcases, and partner demos

squadrons.name: Discovery Squadron
squadrons.purpose: Analyze codebase architecture and build narrative frameworks

agents.name: Codebase Analyst
agents.purpose: Scans repositories to extract architecture patterns, service boundaries, data flows, and technology stack for diagram generation
agents.ip_rule: Extract patterns only, never raw code or internal identifiers

agents.name: Narrative Architect
agents.purpose: Builds investor/partner/demo story arcs using positioning-statement, press-release, and storyboard PM frameworks
agents.ip_rule: Value-level language only, no implementation details

squadrons.name: Generation Squadron
squadrons.purpose: Generate diagrams, apply redaction, compose narrative content
squadrons.gate: All diagrams + content blocks generated and redacted

agents.name: Diagram Renderer
agents.purpose: Generates C4 Context, Container, Process Flow, User Journey, and Deployment Mermaid diagrams at audience-appropriate abstraction levels
agents.ip_rule: Use generic labels per redaction level; never expose internal service names at investor/partner levels

agents.name: Redaction Engine
agents.purpose: Applies IP protection transforms: service name generalization, tech stack abstraction, metric anonymization, algorithm obfuscation per audience level

redaction_levels.maximum: Generic labels, no tech stack, no vendor names, no metrics
redaction_levels.moderate: Tech categories visible, specific tools hidden, ranges for metrics
redaction_levels.light: Stack visible, algorithms/logic hidden, exact metrics hidden

agents.ip_rule: Core agent — enforces all IP boundaries; validates every output token

agents.name: Content Composer
agents.purpose: Writes narrative blocks, speaker notes, slide content, and talking points using positioning + press-release + storyboard frameworks
agents.ip_rule: Product/value language only; no code references, no internal project IDs

squadrons.name: Presentation Squadron
squadrons.purpose: Assemble final HTML showcase and validate IP safety
squadrons.gate: Showcase passes IP leakage check + renders correctly

agents.name: UI Builder
agents.purpose: Assembles glassmorphism HTML showcase with Mermaid diagram rendering, wrapped slideshow, presenter console, navigation, and responsive layout
agents.ip_rule: Render only redacted content; never embed raw source data

agents.name: QA Validator
agents.purpose: Runs IP leakage checks against redaction rules, validates diagram accuracy, verifies no internal names/paths/secrets in external-audience output
validation_checks: No internal service names in external diagrams
No algorithm names or ML model identifiers
No infrastructure provider specifics (at maximum redaction)
No team member names or counts
No pricing or financial specifics beyond permitted level
No internal project identifiers or ticket numbers
No file paths from source system
No API keys, tokens, or credentials
agents.ip_rule: Final gate — blocks publication if ANY leakage detected
